name: Perseverance
first: First helicopter on another planet (Ingenuity); first sample caching for Mars Sample Return
description: Perseverance is the most ambitious Mars surface mission ever flown. Mars Sample Return depends on it — the rover is collecting and caching samples in tubes that a future mission will retrieve and bring to Earth. Ingenuity, the first helicopter on another planet, flew 72 missions before retiring with damaged rotors in January 2024 — proving controlled flight is possible in Mars's thin atmosphere. MOXIE, an oxygen-from-CO2 demonstrator, produced the first locally-made oxygen on another planet, a rehearsal for crewed Mars missions.

events.label: LAUNCH
events.note: Atlas V 541 from Cape Canaveral SLC-41 — same vehicle class as Curiosity.

events.label: EDL
events.note: Sky-crane delivers rover to Jezero Crater 2021-02-18 — site of an ancient river delta.

events.label: TOUCHDOWN
events.note: Perseverance touches down at Jezero 20:55 UTC.

events.label: INGENUITY FIRST FLIGHT
events.note: First powered controlled flight on another planet — 39.1 seconds at up to 5 m altitude.

events.label: INGENUITY RETIRED
events.note: Rotor blade damaged on 72nd flight 2024-01-18; helicopter remains operational as a comms relay.
